intro: Our seven articles from April 12–15, 2026, detail a series of Adobe vulnerabilities, including four critical and three high-severity issues. The coverage highlights specific flaws such as CVE-2026-34621, which carries a CVSS score of 8.6, alongside CVE-2024-20662, CVE-2024-21412, and CVE-2024-34102. These reports document the technical details and patching guidance for the affected software, providing a focused overview of the security updates required during this period.
